metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1317
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3A: Rat hippocampal slices (top and middle) or cultured hippocampal neurons (bottom) were immunostained with anti-RNG105 antibody (green) and costained with anti-RPS6, anti-PSD-95, or anti-staufen antibodies.

25/9/2017 Pim
- Literal: "Quantitative analysis revealed that ~88% of the RNG105-localizing granules were associated with ribosomes. Second, some RNG105-localizing granules (~9%) were accumulated near the postsynaptic sites stained with anti-PSD-95 antibody (Fig. 3A), which may be consistent with the previous report that some proportion of polyribosomes is localized near postsynapses". Experimental description: Rat hippocampal slices or cultured hippocampal neurons
